name: Chicken, Pepper and Tomatoes (Mf)
recipeIngredient: 4 large skinless boneless chicken breast halves, tenders removed
1 cup Italian canned plum tomatoes, cut into strips
salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add the chicken and sauté for 2 minutes on each side to add some color. Remove the chicken to a plate.
3. Add the bell pepper, carrot, celery, and garlic to the skillet. Sauté, stirring continuously, for about 2 minutes or until the vegetables begin to get tender.
4. Add the white wine and let it evaporate. Add the tomatoes and return the chicken on top. Cover and cook over low heat for 5 to 8 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
5. Remove the chicken and serve over warm rice salad. Adjust the seasoning of the pan sauce and spoon over the top.
Yield: 4 servings
